name: avoid-cloud-cost--skill
description: Evidence-based Design-for-Cost / FinOps review of any opted-in software repository. Multi-repo opt-in via `skill-config/avoid-cloud-cost-config.yaml`, whose `prompts:` map feeds per-topic `additional_context` + `inputs` into the topic prompts under `prompts/` (`FINOPS-00-Shared-Context.md` plus the 20 cost topics `FINOPS-01`…`FINOPS-20`). Each topic is graded 1–5 on the canonical `FINOPS-00` rubric; the root-level `Cost-Avoidance-Scorecard.md` gathers every graded topic equal-weight into a single Cost Avoidance Score (1–5, 5 = leanest). Per opted-in repo, emits a fully self-contained HTML report (bundled stylesheet embedded inline, system fonts only, no images) plus an equivalent JSON. Palette excludes pure black and purple / violet hues.
author: sdubeyslb
